headline: Rockwell downgraded at Jefferies on limited re-rating potential
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies assumed coverage of Rockwell Automation with a Hold rating on Tuesday, downgrading the stock from Buy and cutting its price target to $380 from $490, arguing that the industrial automation company’s strong positioning as a reshoring beneficiary is already reflected in its valuation.
